segments.name: AI for UPSC / SSC Prep
segments.description: Best AI tools for UPSC, SSC and government exam preparation.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: ChatGPT by OpenAI is a highly versatile conversational AI model designed to assist users with writing, brainstorming, and complex problem solving across diverse scenarios.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.description: Perplexity is an AI-powered search engine answering queries precisely with cited sources, making it perfect for researchers, students, and professionals needing reliable information fast.

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: Claude is a safe and highly capable AI assistant that excels at nuanced writing, deep analysis, and synthesizing large documents for maximum productivity.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.description: Google's Gemini model provides powerful multimodal assistance, helping users creatively write, code, and analyze data by integrating seamlessly with the Google ecosystem.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.description: Midjourney generates breathtaking, high-quality images from text descriptions, operating through Discord to serve artists, designers, and creatives with stunning visual inspiration.

tools.name: Leonardo AI
tools.description: Leonardo AI provides advanced control over image generation, empowering game developers and artists to create consistent, high-fidelity visual assets tailored to fine-tuned models.

tools.name: Runway
tools.description: Runway offers a suite of magical AI tools for video editing and generation, allowing creators to synthesize and edit video content with unprecedented ease.

tools.name: Pictory
tools.description: Pictory automatically creates high-engaging, short branded videos from long-form content, perfect for marketers and social media managers looking to maximize reach effortlessly.

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.description: Synthesia generates professional videos featuring lifelike AI avatars from plain text, ideal for corporate training, marketing, and global communications without camera gear.

tools.name: Descript
tools.description: Descript revolutionizes audio and video editing by allowing you to edit media as easily as a text document, streamlining podcast and video production workflows.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.description: ElevenLabs delivers incredibly realistic AI voice generation and text-to-speech capabilities, perfect for audiobooks, gaming, and content creators needing premium voiceovers.

tools.name: Murf AI
tools.description: Murf AI provides studio-quality voiceovers from text, offering a wide range of natural-sounding voices suited for e-learning, corporate presentations, and marketing videos.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.description: Notion AI brings artificial intelligence directly into your workspace, helping teams summarize notes, draft documents, and brainstorm ideas without leaving their organizational hub.

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.description: Copy.ai is an automated copywriting assistant that helps marketers and entrepreneurs quickly generate ad copy, blog outlines, and engaging social media posts.

tools.name: Jasper
tools.description: Jasper is an enterprise-grade AI writing platform designed to help marketing teams scale content production while maintaining a consistent and engaging brand voice.

tools.name: Writesonic
tools.description: Writesonic generates SEO-optimized articles, blogs, and ad copy rapidly, giving content creators and marketers an edge in high-volume, high-quality content production.

tools.name: Grammarly
tools.description: Grammarly uses advanced AI to review spelling, grammar, and tone in real-time, ensuring professionals and students communicate clearly and confidently everywhere they type.

tools.name: QuillBot
tools.description: QuillBot is a powerful AI paraphrasing tool that helps writers refine their sentences, improve fluency, and overcome writer's block with intuitive rewriting suggestions.

tools.name: Tome AI
tools.description: Tome AI allows users to generate visually stunning and highly engaging presentations from a simple text prompt, streamlining the storytelling process for professionals.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.description: Gamma is an AI-powered medium for presenting ideas, instantly formatting text into beautiful slides, web pages, or documents for seamless professional communication.

tools.name: Durable AI
tools.description: Durable AI is an intelligent website builder that generates fully functional, professional business websites complete with copy and images in mere seconds.

tools.name: Replit Ghostwriter
tools.description: Replit Ghostwriter is an integrated AI coding assistant that autocomplete code, explains logic, and helps developers build software faster right inside the browser.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.description: GitHub Copilot functions as your AI pair programmer, analyzing context to suggest entire lines or blocks of code, dramatically accelerating the software development lifecycle.

tools.name: Codeium
tools.description: Codeium is a powerful, free AI code completion tool supporting numerous languages and IDEs, helping developers write code faster and with fewer tedious errors.

tools.name: Blackbox AI
tools.description: Blackbox AI helps developers quickly find the best code snippets to build faster, turning natural language questions directly into functional code solutions.

tools.name: Phind
tools.description: Phind is an AI search engine optimized specifically for developers, providing detailed, code-centric answers and explanations to complex programming and technical questions.

tools.name: Zapier AI
tools.description: Zapier AI empowers users to build complex automation workflows across thousands of apps using simple natural language instructions, bypassing the need for manual setup.

tools.name: Make AI
tools.description: Make AI accelerates the creation of visual workflows, helping businesses automate their processes by connecting apps intuitively without writing a single line of code.

tools.name: Bardeen
tools.description: Bardeen brings AI automation directly to your browser, allowing professionals to scrape data, build workflows, and automate repetitive web tasks efficiently.

tools.name: Taskade AI
tools.description: Taskade AI acts as a collaborative workspace that uses artificial intelligence to outline tasks, build mind maps, and manage projects for highly productive teams.

tools.name: HuggingChat
tools.description: HuggingChat is a fully open-source alternative to ChatGPT, providing an accessible and completely free conversational interface for top open-source large language models.

tools.name: LM Studio
tools.description: LM Studio allows you to easily discover, download, and run local large language models (LLMs) on your own machine completely for free, offline.

tools.name: CapCut
tools.description: CapCut offers a massively popular, fully free suite of AI-powered video editing tools including background removal, auto-captions, and video upscaling.

tools.name: Google AI Studio
tools.description: Google AI Studio provides generous free access to Gemini Pro and Gemini Flash models for developers to prototype and build generative AI applications quickly.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.description: NotebookLM is a free experimental product from Google Labs that uses your documents as sources for its AI to answer questions, summarize, and generate podcast-like audio.

tools.name: Kickresume AI
tools.description: Kickresume's AI resume builder creates a beautifully formatted and highly optimized resume or cover letter in seconds using OpenAI technology.

tools.name: Krutrim
tools.description: Krutrim is India's first fully built AI assistant, supporting multiple Indian languages and providing localized, culturally relevant responses for users and developers.

tools.name: Canva AI
tools.description: Canva Magic Studio brings AI to your design workflow with magic write, text-to-image, and auto-presentations.

tools.name: Figma AI
tools.description: Figma introduces AI to generate UI layouts, wireframes, and design systems instantly.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot Workspace
tools.description: AI-native developer environment for planning, coding, and testing in the browser.

tools.name: Cursor AI
tools.description: The AI-first code editor designed for pair programming with advanced large language models.

tools.name: Vercel v0
tools.description: Generate UI components and React code from simple text prompts using Vercel v0.

tools.name: AutoGPT
tools.description: An experimental open-source application showcasing the capabilities of the GPT-4 language model as an autonomous agent.

tools.name: BabyAGI

tools.name: HeyGen

tools.name: Opus Clip
tools.description: AI generative video repurposing tool that turns long videos into viral short clips with captions.

tools.name: ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech
tools.description: The most realistic and versatile AI speech software for creators and publishers.

tools.name: Suno AI

tools.name: Udio

tools.name: Midjourney v6

tools.name: Fireflies.ai

tools.name: Beautiful.ai

tools.name: Miro AI

tools.name: Fotor AI

tools.name: Photoroom

tools.name: DeepL

tools.name: Claude 3 Opus

tools.name: VEED AI
tools.description: VEED AI simplifies online video editing with subtitles, voiceovers, and script-based generation features.

tools.name: Vizard
tools.description: Vizard repurposes long-form recordings into short clips with AI scene detection and captions.

tools.name: Voiceflow
tools.description: Voiceflow helps teams design, test, and ship AI assistants and chat workflows without heavy coding overhead.

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.description: Windsurf is an AI-powered development environment focused on assisted coding, refactoring, and faster shipping.

tools.name: Wordtune
tools.description: Wordtune improves tone, clarity, and rewriting speed for emails, documents, and professional writing.

tools.name: Zencoder
tools.description: Zencoder offers AI-assisted coding and review workflows to help engineering teams move from prompt to production.

tools.name: n8n AI Agent Builder
tools.description: n8n AI Agent Builder enables custom workflow automations that combine APIs, tools, and LLM-driven logic.
